content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic reward mechanisms (like ICM and RND from Topic A) can be re-purposed as a pruning and prioritization gate for long-term memory in cutting-edge 2024-2025 active learning agents. This means an agent only retains new exploration trajectories or environment observations in its long-term memory if they trigger a sufficiently high intrinsic curiosity signal, rather than storing all collected data.
